title: Syrian Herb Wrap
description: A flavorful vegetarian wrap filled with sautéed herbs and spices, perfect for a quick meal.
instructions: Heat molten in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlicky and sauté for 1 minute.
Add Syrian and sauté for 1 minute.
Add herb and sauté for 2 minutes.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 20 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spooning the herb mixture onto the center of the wrap.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling.
Fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Slice in half and serve immediately.
